name: Classic Espresso
description: A tight, syrupy shot pulled from a medium-dark roast. Simple and strong.

name: Vanilla Oat Latte
description: Espresso, steamed oat milk, and a touch of house-made vanilla syrup.

name: Iced Cold Brew
description: Steeped for 18 hours, served over ice. Smooth, low acidity, no bitterness.

name: Matcha Cloud
description: Ceremonial-grade matcha, cold milk, and a whipped cold foam top.

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Baked fresh every morning, finished with a brown butter glaze.

name: Almond Croissant
description: Twice-baked and filled with almond cream, dusted with powdered sugar.

name: Chai Latte
description: A house-spiced chai concentrate steamed with whole milk.

name: Iced Americano
description: Espresso over ice, topped with cold water. Crisp and clean.
